nf:module.nf:name: network_processor
nf:module.nf:description: Registers for Pipeline CPU with Trace Buffer

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_imem_interact
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_imem_write
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_imem_rw_address
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_imem_wdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_imem_interact
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_imem_write
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_imem_rw_address
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_imem_wdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: sw_reset
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_dmem_r_addr
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_dmem_interact
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_imem_rdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: gpu_pc_end
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_imem_rdata
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: cpu_pc_end
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_dmem_rdata_low
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_state
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_dmem_rdata_mid
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.

nf:register.nf:name: fifo_dmem_rdata_high
nf:register.nf:description: Control Register. Bit 0: Force Reset. Bit 1: Enable Trace Capture.
